name: pi-harness
description: Portable unattended PI harness for developer/tester/visual-review loops.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/pi-client.mjs && node --check src/pi-config.mjs && node --check src/pi-prompts.mjs && node --check src/pi-repo.mjs && node --check src/pi-report.mjs && node --check src/pi-rpc-adapter.mjs && node --check src/pi-supervisor.mjs && node --check src/pi-telemetry.mjs && node --check src/pi-visual-once.mjs && node --check src/pi-visual-review.mjs && node --check src/index.mjs
